content: اِلبوليس بِيِحَوِّل يُقبِض عَلى اِلسَوَّاقين اِللي بِياخُذوا مُخَدِّرات
translations: eng:the police are trying to catch drivers who are taking drugs

transcriptions.arabizi: ilboolees biyihawwil yu'bud Aala ilsawwa'een il-li biyaachuzu muchaddaraat
